sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113606" key="xeirobarh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειρο-βᾰρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n113606.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">heauy in the hand,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0489.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philetaer.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope> </bibl> (lyr.).</sense> </entryFree>
